content.claim: Hungary's 6- and 8-year gimnázium tracks serve approximately 22,000–25,000 students across roughly 200 schools, representing a small share of total enrollment.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Education finance lens
limitations: Based on single expert statement rather than official enrollment registry
No specific year of data collection provided
Does not include 4-year gimnázium enrollment figures
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
